blocks.text: Champions League Night of Comebacks — Two Deficits, Two Miracles Needed

Tuesday delivers a double Champions League earthquake: Liverpool host PSG and Barcelona travel to Atlético, both trailing 2-0. Somebody pulls off the impossible tonight — or two giants are eliminated.
⛳ Masters Tournament continues — Rory McIlroy leads at -13, Hovland chasing after a brilliant round. Follow the leaderboard all day.
🚴 Tour of Norway 2026 kicks off — Tobias Halland Johannessen and Andreas Leknessund headline Norway's home grand tour. 11:00
♟️ FIDE Candidates Round 13 — Critical penultimate rounds begin as the next World Chess Championship challenger takes shape. 14:30
🎾 Casper Ruud at Barcelona Open — Ruud targets another deep run on his favourite clay surface. 09:00
